name: Naeto C
description:
'''Naetochukwu Chikwe''' {{Audio|LL-Q33578 (ibo)-Chinwoke 01-Naetochukwu Chikwe.wav|Listen|help=no}}, stage name '''Naeto C''', is a Nigerian rapper, [[Afrobeat]] artist and record producer. He rose to prominence with the track 'Kini Big Deal' which is credited for changing the Nigerian hip hop sound. Known for his catchy hooks and smooth flow, he is regarded as one of the most influential Nigerian rappers.

He has won several awards some of which are the HHWA best hip hop single 2009, [[Soundcity MVP Awards Festival|Soundcity]] best male video 2009, Best new act at the MTV MAMA’s award 2008. He also won 3 Channel O Awards, [[The Headies]] and many others.
